name: Indonesian Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 6 oz med shrimp (41-to-50 per lb), shelled and deveined
6 cups cold cooked long-grain white rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover tamarind pulp with 1/2 cup boiling water. Mash the fibers and seeds.
2. Strain and reserve 1/3 cup tamarind water in a food processor or mortar, process or pound shallots, garlic, chiles, shrimp paste, turmeric, and salt into a smooth paste.
3. Heat oil in a wok or skillet until hot. Add the spice paste; gently brown.
4. Turn heat to high and add shrimp; stir-fry until they turn bright orange, about 30 seconds. Remove and set aside.
5. Add bell peppers, peas, and cabbage; stir-fry until vegetables are cooked but still crisp, about 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Add rice; stir-fry together, breaking up the lumps of rice.
7. When the rice grains are separated, add tamarind water, ketjap manis (or dark soy sauce), light soy sauce, green onions, chicken, barbecued pork, and reserved shrimp.
8. Mix together and check for seasonings.
9. Transfer to a serving plate, garnish with coriander leaves, and arrange sliced cucumbers around the edge.
